title: CosmeticArmorCompatibility
description: A simple mod that makes Cosmetic Armor compatible with most other mods.
body:
This lightweight patch bridges Cosmetic Armor slots so they stay visible even when other overhauls touch the inventory, preventing visual gear from vanishing.

一个小补丁，让Cosmetic Armor在与其他大型背包/装备类模组共存时不再消失，确保你的时装始终生效。
